{{Quote|You have chosen wisely, Asyr. He is youthful and even handsome by their standards. His body will say all we want to say, and more.|Dmaynel Kiph|<ref name="WG" />}}
'''Dmaynel Kiph''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] who lived in the [[Alien Protection Zone/Legends|Invisec]] area of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|It is rare among us to find one who so openly professes his friendship with a bigot.|Dmaynel Kiph|<ref name="WG" />}}
Kiph hated the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for its [[Speciesism|speciesist]] policies. Gathering a like-minded band of non-humans, Kiph formed the [[Alien Combine]], an anti-Imperial, anti-Human band of [[Alien Protection Zone/Legends|Invisec]] dwellers. They carried out attacks against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and, quick to judge [[Human/Legends|Humans]] as bigoted, [[Death/Legends|killed]] those they felt to be so and sent their bodies back as warnings to the Empire. One such potential victim was [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Gavin Darklighter]], but when Darklighter and his Rogue companions were brought before Kiph, the Empire raided the Alien Combine's headquarters. Kiph was wounded in the firefight, but the Rogues saved him and he went on to aid them in capturing Coruscant.<ref name="WG" />

{{Char-stub}}
